verses.text: Topa in Moses leh Aaron kiangah

“Mi khat in ama pumpi vun tungah a bawk ahi a, meima ahi a, a mel tuampian ahi zongin a neih a, tua pen ama pumpi vun tungah phaknatna a suah leh, tuapa pen siampipa kiang ahi a, ama tapa siampi khat peuhpeuh kiangah ahi zongin kipaipih ding hi

Siampipa in ama pumpi vun tunga natna mun vel ding hi. A natna munah a om a multe kangin ama vun sangin a natna thuktum zaw-in a kimuh leh, tua pen phaknatna hi a, siampipa in a vel khit ciangin amah a nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi
Ahih hangin ama pumpi vun sungah a natna mun kang napi-in, a vun sangin a thuklozaw bangin omin, tua sungah a multe kangloin a om leh, siampipa in ni sagih sung cinapa khumcip ding hi
Siampipa in a ni sagih ni-in amah vel ding a, a natna noptuamin, a natna in a vun sung lawhlo hi ci-in a muh leh, siampipa in ni sagih sung mah khumcip lai ding hi

Siampipa in a ni sagih ni-in amah vel kik ding a, a natna mun mualin, a vun sung a lawh kei leh, siang hi, ci-in siampipa in gen ding hi. Tua pen meima mawkmawk hi lel a, amah in a puante sawpin a siang hi ding hi
Ahih hangin amah a sian'na dingin siampipa kiangah a kilah khit ciangin a meima in a vun sung a lawh leh siampipa mai-ah kilak kik ding hi
Siampipa in vel ding a, a meima in a vun sung a lawh leh phaknatna hi a, siampipa in amah a nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi
“Mi khat in meima a neih ciangin siampipa kiangah kipaipih ding hi
Siampipa in vel ding a, a vun sungah a bawk kang omin, tua in a multe kangsakin a bawk sungah ma thak a om leh
tua pen ama pumpi vun sungah a om luisa phaknatna hi a, siampipa in amah a nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi. Amah a nin ahih manin khumciplo ding hi
Siampipa' muh theihna ciangah tua natna in a vun phukhamin, tua natna a veipa' vun khempeuh a lutang panin a khe dongin a lawh khit leh
siampipa in vel ding a, a natna in a pumpi khempeuh a lawh khit leh siampipa in tua natna tawh kisai-in amah siang hi, ci-in gen ding hi. A pumpi-in kang khin ahih manin amah a siang ahi hi
Ahih hangin ama tungah ma thak a kilat ciangin amah a nin hi ding hi
Siampipa in a ma thak velin, amah a nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a ma thak pen phaknatna ahih manin a nin ahi hi
Ahih hangin a ma thak pen kikhel kikin a kang a suah leh, siampipa kiangah pai ding a
siampipa in amah velin a natna pen a kang a suah leh, siampipa in natna a veipa siang hi, ci-in gen ding a, amah a siang hi ding hi
“Mi khatpeuh' pumpi vun sungah a damsa meimatum khat om a
a meimatum munah a bawk kang ahi a, a san kang mun ahi zongin a om leh, siampipa kiangah kilak ding hi
Siampipa in vel ding a, tua pen a vun sangin thukzaw-in a multe a kang a suah leh, siampipa in amah nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi. Tua pen phaknatna hi a, meimatum sung tawnin hong phukhia ahi hi
Ahih hangin siampipa in velin, tua tunga a multe kangloin a vun sangin a thukzawk kei a, mualin a om leh, siampipa in ni sagih sung khumcip ding hi
Tua in a vun sung a lawh leh phaknatna hi a, siampipa in amah nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi
Ahih hangin a natna mun pen mun khat bekah omin a kilawh kei leh meimatum pawn hi a, siampipa in amah a siang hi, ci-in gen ding hi
“Tua ahih kei leh, pumpi in a vun tungah meikangma khat nei-in tua meikangma a thak mun pen a san kang ahi a, a kang ahi zongin hong suah leh

siampipa in vel ding hi. Tua muna om a multe kangin a vun sangin a natna a thukzawk leh, tua pen phaknatna ahi hi. Tua pen meikangma tawnin hong phukhia hi a, phaknatna ahih manin siampipa in amah a nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi
Ahih hangin siampipa in velin, tua mun a multe kangloin a vun sangin a thukzawk kei a, mualin a om leh, siampipa in ni sagih sung khumcip ding hi
Siampipa in a ni sagih ni-in amah vel ding hi. Tua in a vun sung a lawh leh phaknatna hi a, siampipa in amah nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi
Ahih hangin a natna mun pen mun khat bekah omin a vun sung lawhloin mualin a om leh, tua pen meikangma pana bawk hi a, meikangma pawn ahih manin siampipa in amah siang hi, ci-in gen ding hi
“Numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin a lutang tung ahih kei leh a kha-ah meima khatpeuh a neih ciangin

siampipa in tua natna vel ding hi. Tua natna pen a vun sangin thukzaw-in a kimuh a, a sunga a multe eng-in a mal a neu leh, siampipa in amah a nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi. Tua pen cithak ahi, lu-phak ahih kei leh kha-phak natna ahi hi
Siampipa in cithak natna velin, a vun sangin thukzawlo bangin kimu-in tua sungah mul vom a om kei leh, siampipa in ni sagih sung cithak natna tawh tuapa khumcip ding a
a ni sagih ni-in siampipa in a natna vel ding hi. A cithak kilawh loin, a sungah mul eng omloin, a cithak pen a vun sangin thukzaw lo-in a kimuh leh
amah leh amah a mul kikiat ding a, ahih hangin a cithak san kiatlo ding hi. Siampipa in adang ni sagih sung mah cithak natna tawh tuapa khum ding hi

A ni sagih ni-in siampipa in a cithak vel ding a, a cithak in a vun sung lawhloin, a vun sangin a thuklo zaw-in a kimuh leh, siampipa in amah a siang hi, ci-in gen ding hi. Amah in ama puante sawp ding a, a siang hi ding hi
Ahih hangin amah a kisian'sak khit ciangin a cithak in a vun sung a lawh leh
siampipa in vel ding a, a cithak in a vun sung a lawh takpi leh, siampipa in mul eng a zon' ding kisamlo hi; amah a nin ahi hi
Ahih hangin ama mitah, cithak noptuam zo hi, ci-in mu a, a sungah mul vom po-in a cithak a dam leh, amah a siang hi a, siampipa in amah a siang hi, ci-in gen ding hi
“Numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin, a pumpi vun tungah a mel tuampian a kang mun a neih leh
siampipa in vel ding a, a pumpi vun tunga om a tuampian munte pen a kang milmial ahih leh, tua pen vun a phukham meima hi a, amah a siang hi ding hi
“Mi khat a sam pulh a, a lu a tol hangin amah a siang ahi hi
Mi khat a taltang leh a paang panin a sam leh a mul a pulh leh, amah a talkolh hi lel a, amah a siang ahi hi
Ahih hangin a lutol tung hita leh a talkolh tung hita leh-ah a san kang meima a om leh, tua pen a lutol tung ahih kei leh a talkolh tunga a suakkhia phaknatna ahi hi
Tua ciangin siampipa in amah vel ding a, a bawk natna pen a lutol tung hita leh a talkolh tung hita leh-ah, pumpi vun tunga phak om tawh kibangin a san kang ahih leh
amah pen miphak hi a, a nin ahih manin siampipa in amah a nin hi, ci-in a gen kul hi; a lutang tungah ama natna a om ahi hi
“Tua natna a nei mi phakpa in puankekte silhin a sam phiahsak ding a, amah in a muk humin, ‘Nin, nin!,’ ci-in kiko ding hi
Amah in a natna a neih laiteng a nin hi ding hi. Amah a nin ahih manin giahphual pualam mun khatah amah guak teng ding hi
“Samul puan hita leh saihadial puan hita leh, puan khat peuhpeuh tungah phaknatna a om ciang
tua saihadial puan, samul puante, a tung leh a pheite' tung hita leh, savun leh savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh tungah a om ciangin

tua natna pen a hing melin ahi a, a san melin ahi zongin puan tungah a kilat ciang, puan a tung a phei tung hita leh savun leh savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh tungah a om ciangin, tua pen phaknatna hi a, siampipa kiangah kilak ding hi
Siampipa in a natna vel ding a, tua natna a baan'na na pen ni sagih sung koihcip ding hi

Tua ciangin amah in a ni sagih ni-in a natna velkik ding hi. A natna pen puan tungah kizelin, puan a tung a phei-ah hita leh, savun leh savun a kizatna na khat peuhpeuh tungah a om leh, tua natna pen a lauhuai phaknatna hi a, a nin ahi hi

Amah in a puan hal ding hi. Tua natna pen puan a tung a phei-ah hita leh, samul puan saihadial puan hita leh savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh tungah a om leh hal ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen a lauhuai phaknatna ahih manin mei sungah kihal ding hi
“Siampipa in velin, a natna pen puan tung, a tung a phei-ah hita leh, savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh tungah a kizelh kei leh
siampipa in tua natna a ban'na pen amaute in a sawp ding uh thu pia ding a, amah in adang ni sagih sung mah tua na koihcip ding hi

Siampipa in tua natna a ban'na pen a kisawp khit ciangin vel ding hi. Tua natna a ban'na mun a mel a kikhel kei leh, a natna a kizelh loh hangin tua pen a nin mah ahi hi. Tua natna pen a sunglamah ahi a, a pualamah ahi zongin a baan' leh mei sungah tua puan na hal ding uh hi

Ahih hangin siampipa in vel a, a kisawp khit ciangin a meima a mualh leh, amah in a puan tung pan hita leh savun tung pan hita leh a puan a tung a phei tung pan hita leh natna a baan'na mun balkhia ding hi

Tua ciangin a puan tung hita leh puan a tung a phei tungah hita leh savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh tungah a kilatkik leh, tua natna a kizel ahih manin natna a baan'na pen mei tawh na hal ding uh hi
Ahih hangin a puan hita leh puan a tung a phei hita leh savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh a kisawp khit ciangin tua natna a paikhiatna na pen, a nih veina kisawp kikin a siang hi ding hi,” a ci hi

Hih pen samul puan hita leh saihadial puan hita leh puan a tung hita leh a phei hita leh, savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh tungah a om phaknatna tawh kisai-in siang hiam, nin hiam, ci-in khenna ding ahi hi.
